query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: New York
Destination: Marsa Matruh
Dates: 2026-05-11 to 2026-05-13
Budget: Cheap
Party: Couple
Interests: Road Trips, Camel Riding, Backpacking

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan adheres to the expected JSON structure, including trip details, itinerary, budget breakdown, and landmarks with all required fields present and correctly typed.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace is located in Marsa Matruh. With a 'Budget' luxury level specified and an accommodation cost of EGP 2400 for two nights for a couple, it aligns well with the 'Cheap' budget and 'Couple' party preferences.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The plan explicitly states 'luxury_level: Budget' and provides a budget breakdown where the total (EGP 13400 for 3 days for a couple) and individual activity/meal costs (EGP 200-250) are very low, aligning with a 'Cheap' budget, especially considering the lack of flight costs from New York.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: Each day's activities are listed in sequential order according to the provided time slots. However, the days are extremely long, often extending past midnight, which, while chronological, is unrealistic in terms of execution.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (destination, duration, budget level, number of people, and dates) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: Embark on a budget-friendly and culturally rich road trip to Marsa Matruh, Egypt, from May 11-13, 2026. This packed itinerary for a couple focuses on exploring local attractions, historical sites, and beautiful coastal areas, offering a deep dive into the region's charm.

itinerary.day: Day 1: Arrival and Western Coast Exploration

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace
activities.description: Arrive in Marsa Matruh and check into the comfortable Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace, your base for this adventure. Settle in and prepare for a day of exploration.

activities.title: Visit Sidi El-Awwam Mosque
activities.description: Start your day with a visit to the popular Sidi El-Awwam Mosque, a significant cultural and religious site in Marsa Matruh.

activities.title: Discover لسان شط الغرام
activities.description: Explore لسان شط الغرام, another popular cultural destination offering unique local insights and scenic views.

activities.title: Lunch at New Sultana
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch featuring local and international cuisine at New Sultana restaurant.

activities.title: Stroll along ممشي الافاتار avatar
activities.description: Take a pleasant afternoon stroll at ممشي الافاتار avatar, a popular tourist destination known for its atmosphere.

activities.title: Relax at شاطئ رأس الحكمة
activities.description: Unwind and enjoy the beauty of شاطئ رأس الحكمة, a popular beach destination in Marsa Matruh.

activities.title: Visit مصيد koko
activities.description: Explore مصيد koko, an attraction located in the same area as شاطئ رأس الحكمة, offering another unique cultural experience.

activities.title: Explore Cleopatra Bath
activities.description: Visit the historic Cleopatra Bath, a popular cultural attraction in the region.

activities.title: Ascend جبل روميل مطروح
activities.description: Experience the views from جبل روميل مطروح, a popular tourist destination offering scenic overlooks.

activities.title: Dinner at Rommel House Restaurant
activities.description: Conclude your action-packed day with a late dinner at Rommel House Restaurant, serving local and international dishes.

itinerary.day: Day 2: Promenades, Beaches, and Salt Caves

activities.title: Visit Salt Cave Salman كهف الملح سلمان
activities.description: Begin your day by exploring the unique Salt Cave Salman, a fascinating cultural destination.

activities.title: Stroll along ممشي باب البحر
activities.description: Enjoy a walk along ممشي باب البحر, a popular promenade offering lovely views and a relaxed atmosphere.

activities.title: Lunch at Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant
activities.description: Savor your mid-day meal at Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant, known for its local and international specialties.

activities.title: Discover سيڤانا ترافيل
activities.description: Explore سيڤانا ترافيل, a highly-rated popular tourist destination.

activities.title: Relax at شاطئ قرية السوينات موسي ناجي حمد
activities.description: Spend some time at شاطئ قرية السوينات موسي ناجي حمد, a popular beach and cultural spot located in the same vibrant area.

activities.title: Explore مطروح جنه وروح
activities.description: Continue your cultural exploration at مطروح جنه وروح, situated in the same popular tourist cluster.

activities.title: Walk along ممشي الخمارى السياحى
activities.description: Enjoy an evening walk at ممشي الخمارى السياحى, a popular and scenic promenade.

activities.title: Discover Ava ممشي مطروح
activities.description: Continue your evening exploration at Ava ممشي مطروح, another vibrant promenade area nearby.

activities.title: Dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد
activities.description: Enjoy a late dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد, offering local and international cuisine to end your day.

activities.title: Visit Rommel's Cave Museum
activities.description: Start your final day with a morning visit to Rommel's Cave Museum, an interesting historical and cultural site.

activities.title: Explore صخرة شاطئ روميل
activities.description: Discover صخرة شاطئ روميل, a picturesque cultural spot near Rommel's Cave.

activities.title: Lunch at MR.Chick
activities.description: Enjoy a satisfying lunch at MR.Chick, known for its chef's specials and local/international menu.

activities.title: Relax at the Beach
activities.description: Spend a relaxing afternoon at a local Beach in Marsa Matrouh, enjoying the coastal atmosphere.

activities.title: Visit اكوا بارك كيلوباترا
activities.description: Explore اكوا بارك كيلوباترا, a popular cultural attraction that promises an engaging experience.

activities.title: Discover شمسيات شاطئ زمرده
activities.description: Continue your exploration at شمسيات شاطئ زمرده, another popular spot in the same vibrant area.

activities.title: Visit مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓
activities.description: Conclude your cultural visits at مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓, a local point of interest.

activities.title: Dinner at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر
activities.description: Enjoy your final dinner in Marsa Matruh at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر, before preparing for departure.
